name: ModifyTouristAccountData
description: Change data of a selected account Tourist.
postconditions: The system has been reporting the information required by the selected account Tourist.
The system has been reporting the information required by the selected account Tourist.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.

steps: Tourists from the list obtained by activating the use case SearchTourist it selects and activates a function to modify data.
Loads the data selected and displays them in a form allowing the change.
Edit the fields in the form and submit.
Verify the information and asks for confirmation of the change. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
Stores the modified data selected account.
